name: Assistant Chat Memory + Laravel Tools (Laravel DB, n8n 1.117)

parameters.jsCode: const src = $input.first().json.body ?? $input.first().json; const sqlEscape = (v) => String(v ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const threadId = src.thread_id ?? src.session_id ?? src.chat_id ?? src.user_uuid; if (!threadId) throw new Error('thread_id or user_uuid is required'); if (!src.user_uuid) throw new Error('user_uuid is required'); const message = src.message ?? src.text ?? src.query ?? ''; if (!message) throw new Error('message is required'); return [{ json: { thread_id: String(threadId), thread_id_sql: sqlEscape(threadId), user_uuid: String(src.user_uuid), user_uuid_sql: sqlEscape(src.user_uuid), message: String(message), message_sql: sqlEscape(message), channel: String(src.channel ?? 'n8n'), channel_sql: sqlEscape(src.channel ?? 'n8n'), base_url: String(src.base_url ?? 'https://app.clevercrm.pro'), assistant_token: String(src.assistant_token ?? 'PASTE_ASSISTANT_TOKEN'), llm_base_url: String(src.llm_base_url ?? 'https://api.deepseek.com'), llm_model: String(src.llm_model ?? 'deepseek-chat'), llm_api_key: String(src.llm_api_key ?? 'PASTE_LLM_API_KEY'), recent_limit: Number(src.recent_limit ?? 12) } }];

parameters.query: WITH upsert_thread AS ( INSERT INTO ai_threads (thread_id, user_uuid, channel, summary, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{$('Normalize Input').first().json.thread_id_sql}}', '{{$('Normalize Input').first().json.user_uuid_sql}}', '{{$('Normalize Input').first().json.channel_sql}}', '', NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (thread_id) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = NOW(), user_uuid = EXCLUDED.user_uuid, channel = EXCLUDED.channel RETURNING id, thread_id, summary ), insert_user_message AS ( INSERT INTO ai_messages (thread_ref_id, thread_id, role, content, meta, message_at, created_at, updated_at) SELECT id, thread_id, 'user', '{{$('Normalize Input').first().json.message_sql}}', json_build_object('channel', '{{$('Normalize Input').first().json.channel_sql}}'), NOW(), NOW(), NOW() FROM upsert_thread RETURNING id ) SELECT id AS thread_ref_id, summary, COALESCE(( SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(x) ORDER BY x.message_at) FROM ( SELECT role, content, message_at FROM ai_messages WHERE thread_id = '{{$('Normalize Input').first().json.thread_id_sql}}' ORDER BY message_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT {{$('Normalize Input').first().json.recent_limit}} ) x ), '[]'::json) AS recent_messages FROM upsert_thread;

parameters.jsCode: const text = $('Normalize Input').first().json.message.toLowerCase(); let tool = 'weekly-summary'; let path = '/weekly-summary?limit=10'; const dealMatch = $('Normalize Input').first().json.message.match(/\b\d{6,}\b/); if ((/сделк|deal/.test(text)) && dealMatch) { tool = 'deal-context'; path = `/deal-context/${dealMatch[0]}`; } else if (/daily|сегодня|день|сутк/.test(text)) { tool = 'daily-summary'; path = '/daily-summary?limit=10'; } else if (/недел|weekly/.test(text)) { tool = 'weekly-summary'; path = '/weekly-summary?limit=10'; } else if (/просроч|overdue/.test(text)) { tool = 'overdue-tasks'; path = '/overdue-tasks?limit=10'; } else if (/риск|risk/.test(text)) { tool = 'risky-deals'; path = '/risky-deals?limit=10'; } else if (/без задач|next task/.test(text)) { tool = 'deals-without-next-task'; path = '/deals-without-next-task?limit=10'; } else if (/необработ|unprocessed/.test(text)) { tool = 'unprocessed-leads'; path = '/unprocessed-leads?limit=10'; } return [{ json: { tool_name: tool, tool_path: path } }];

const input = $('Normalize Input').first().json; const ctx = $('Load Conversation Context').first().json; const route = $('Route Tool').first().json; const rawRecent = ctx.recent_messages; let recent = []; if (Array.isArray(rawRecent)) { recent = rawRecent; } else if (typeof rawRecent === 'string' && rawRecent) { try { recent = JSON.parse(rawRecent); } catch (e) { recent = []; } } const recentText = recent.slice(-input.recent_limit).map((m) => `${m.role}: ${m.content}`).join('\n'); const toolPayload = $input.first().json.data ?? $input.first().json; const prompt = [ 'Ты AI-ассистент руководителя отдела продаж.', 'Используй только факты из CRM payload и контекст диалога.', 'Если данных недостаточно, прямо скажи об этом.', '', 'Краткая память диалога:', ctx.summary || 'Пока пусто.', '', 'Последние сообщения:', recentText || 'Пока пусто.', '', `Текущий вопрос: ${input.message}`, '', `Источник данных: ${route.tool_name}`, 'CRM facts:', JSON.stringify(toolPayload, null, 2), '', 'Верни короткий ответ по-русски, без JSON и без markdown-кода.' ].join('\n'); return [{ json: { thread_id: input.thread_id, thread_ref_id: ctx.thread_ref_id, user_uuid: input.user_uuid, llm_base_url: input.llm_base_url, llm_model: input.llm_model, llm_api_key: input.llm_api_key, tool_name: route.tool_name, tool_payload: toolPayload, final_prompt: prompt } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: $('Build Chat Prompt').first().json.llm_model, temperature: 0.2, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'Ты AI-ассистент руководителя отдела продаж. Отвечай по-русски кратко и по делу.' }, { role: 'user', content: $('Build Chat Prompt').first().json.final_prompt } ] } }}

parameters.jsCode: const sqlEscape = (v) => String(v ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''"); const response = $input.first().json; const assistantText = response.choices?.[0]?.message?.content ?? 'LLM did not return a message.'; return [{ json: { assistant_text: assistantText, assistant_text_sql: sqlEscape(assistantText) } }];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO ai_messages (thread_ref_id, thread_id, role, content, meta, message_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ({{$('Build Chat Prompt').first().json.thread_ref_id}}, '{{$('Normalize Input').first().json.thread_id_sql}}', 'assistant', '{{$('Extract Assistant Message').first().json.assistant_text_sql}}', json_build_object('tool', '{{$('Route Tool').first().json.tool_name}}'), NOW(), NOW(), NOW()); UPDATE ai_threads SET updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{$('Build Chat Prompt').first().json.thread_ref_id}};

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { thread_id: $('Normalize Input').first().json.thread_id, text: $('Extract Assistant Message').first().json.assistant_text, tool: $('Route Tool').first().json.tool_name, tool_payload: $('Fetch Laravel Tool').first().json.data ?? $('Fetch Laravel Tool').first().json } }}
